subject: Geography
title: Mapping Other Worlds
description: A short lesson to help you apply Mapping Other Worlds.

hook.text: NASA has mapped Mars in higher resolution than most of Earth's ocean floor.

buildup.text: Mars rovers carry LiDAR and cameras that map terrain centimeter by centimeter.

discovery.text: The Moon's surface is now mapped so precisely that future bases can be planned remotely.

twist.text: Titan, Saturn's moon, has lakes of liquid methane mapped by the Cassini probe's radar.

climax.text: Cartography has expanded from clay tablets to mapping worlds we've never set foot on.

punchline.text: We started mapping fields. Now we map planets.

quiz.question: What liquid fills the lakes on Saturn's moon Titan?
